title: Agent command: canonical opts + per-tier translation
desc: wkappbot agent 'task' - tier uses Claude-standard canonical flags as universal interface. All AI types (haiku/sonnet/opus/gpt/gemini/codex-mini/triad) share the same arg format. Translation layer converts to each backend. New tiers: gpt, gemini. Session persistence: .wkappbot/agents/last-{tier}.jsonl
steps: Run agent with canonical opts: wkappbot agent 'task' - opus --max-turns 5
Check last task: wkappbot agent last
Follow up: wkappbot agent resume 'follow-up question'
New tiers: wkappbot agent 'task' - gpt OR wkappbot agent 'task' - gemini
author: claude
